nasb.text: Ahaziah was twenty-two years old when he became king, and he reigned one year in Jerusalem. And his mother’s name was Athaliah, the granddaughter of Omri.

esv.text: Ahaziah was twenty-two years old when he began to reign, and he reigned one year in Jerusalem. His mother’s name was Athaliah, the granddaughter of Omri.

cnv.text: 亞哈謝登基的時候是二十二歲；他在耶路撒冷作王一年。他的母親名叫亞他利雅，是暗利的孫女。

ccb.text: 亚哈谢二十二岁登基，在耶路撒冷执政一年。他母亲叫亚她利雅，是暗利的孙女。
